title: DevBox — Auto-Detect & Decode Any Developer String Instantly
description: Stop switching between 12 different converter tabs. DevBox auto-detects what you pasted — JSON, JWT, base64, unix timestamps, regex, cron, hex colors.

schemas.name: DevBox
schemas.description: Universal developer tool that auto-detects and converts JSON, JWT, base64, timestamps, cron expressions, colors, regex, CSV, and more.
